title: PUBG MOBILE
notes:
V4.5 has two mega collaborations with NARUTO and Spider-Man: Brand New Day. Join the ultimate crossover battle now!

Battle Royale
NARUTO Collaboration
1. Themed Mode: The Nine-Tails has invaded! Join forces with all players to battle the rampaging Nine-Tails and protect the Hidden Leaf.
2. Classic Locations: Places like the Hidden Leaf Village and Valley of the End have been faithfully recreated to immerse you in the ninja world.
3. Seven Ninjutsu: Pull off ninja highlights with Flying Raijin J

title: Subway Surfers
notes:
- Bienvenue to Subway Surfers Paris! Dash through the Parisian streets and gear up for the biggest cycling competition in the world.
- Meet our two new Surfers who are ready to join the Crew: Marie Macaron, bringing sweetness to every run, and Pierre with his Parisian flair, both ready to show off the city in style.
- Get in the spirit for the summer festivities and join us to celebrate Gamers Week and Disability Pride Month with fun events and content.

title: Yalla Ludo - Ludo&Jackaroo
notes:
Updates:
1.Lucky Ludo is here! Spin the wheels, try your luck, and trigger all kinds of surprise events. Set off chain reactions and race to the end—be the first to dominate the board!
2.Ludo VIP Room experience upgraded! VIP Room now supports the Team mode. Invite your friends and enjoy the fun together!
3.The gift-sending feature in private chat is coming soon. You can send gifts directly while chatting with friends, making every conversation a little warmer.

title: MadOut 2: Grand Racing games
notes:
- "Car Theft" Event: A new, risky opportunity to earn money has appeared in the city. During the event, find suitable cars, steal them, and deliver them to the drop-off points before you're stopped. The cleaner your job, the higher the reward.
- "Lost Cargo" Event: Planes periodically fly over the city, dropping valuable cargo containers. Get to the drop-off point, open the container, collect the loot, and deliver it to the drop-off point. But be prepared: such cargo can be quite a hunt.
- Angel
